clinical_details: Symptoms include rectal bleeding, mucous discharge, reduced appetite, and intermittent bloating for 7 weeks. Patient also reports fatigue. Relevant history includes rheumatoid arthritis.
mdt_outcome:
PET-CT on 29/09/2024: FDG-avid lesion in the low rectum, no distant uptake.
MDT Outcome(h)
PET-CT and oncology consultation.
